name: quizgame
description: Cross-platform live quiz game built with Expo and Node.js

scripts.build: npm run build -w @quizgame/contracts && npm run build -w @quizgame/server && npm run typecheck -w @quizgame/client
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @quizgame/contracts && npm run typecheck -w @quizgame/server && npm run typecheck -w @quizgame/client
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run build
